meeting.transcript: The customer explained that service teams use separate systems for tickets, renewals, and account notes. Managers want a clearer weekly view of delayed work, customer risk, and recommended next steps before renewal conversations begin.

salesperson_notes.content: The account team believes an executive sponsor may join the next meeting.

known_constraints.description: The customer wants an initial recommendation before quarterly planning.
